/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,-rpath,/home/kyle/Collage/HeadMotion/code/MetaWear-SDK-Cpp/dist/release/lib/x64 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/headmotion.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/headmotion.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o headmotion   -L/home/kyle/Collage/HeadMotion/code/MetaWear-SDK-Cpp/dist/release/lib/x64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kyle/Collage/HeadMotion/code/MetaWear-SDK-Cpp/dist/release/lib/x64 libheadmotion_ble.a libheadmotion_storage.a -lsimpleble -lmetawear /usr/lib/libdbus-1.so
